categories.label: Victims Saved
categories.description: Count of victims successfully rescued to exit spaces

categories.label: Killer Health Removed
categories.description: Total health markers removed from the Killer

categories.label: Items Found
categories.description: Number of items acquired during the game

categories.label: Final Horror Level
categories.description: Subtract points equal to the final Horror Level (lower is better)

categories.label: Victims Killed
categories.description: Subtract 1 point per victim killed during the game

categories.label: Victory Bonus
categories.description: Bonus points if the Killer was defeated (suggested: 10 points)
